title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jungle Lodges Karnataka - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jungle Lodges Karnataka - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka!
